title: Vendor AI Assessment
description: Schema for documenting an assessment of a vendor's AI practices and tool

review_id.description: Unique identifier for this vendor assessment

vendor_name.description: Name of the vendor being assessed

product_name.description: Name of the AI-enabled product or service

contract_signed_date.description: When the vendor contract was signed

ai_features_description.description: What AI features and capabilities the product has

ai_transparency.description: How transparent is the vendor about AI capabilities and limitations

model_traceability.description: Can the vendor explain how the model makes decisions

training_data_clarity.description: How clearly does vendor disclose training data sources

bias_mitigation.description: Does vendor address bias and fairness concerns

human_override_capability.description: Can users override or disable AI recommendations

data_processing_transparency.description: Is vendor clear about how customer data is used

dpa_in_place.description: Is a Data Processing Agreement signed

dpa_adequacy.description: Does the DPA adequately cover AI data processing

conditions_or_mitigations.description: Conditions or mitigations if approved with conditions

decision_record_link.description: Reference to the formal decision record (e.g., toolkit template reference)
